title: Adobe India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Adobe India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Adobe India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Jodhpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Adobe India:
Adobe India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adobe India!
